assertion_results.text: The 9-column data table is converted to a card or list layout on mobile, or wrapped in an isolated horizontal scroll container (not the document)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 23-105: CustomerCard component renders each customer as an expandable card. No <table> element on mobile. Desktop table absent entirely (mobile-only design).

assertion_results.text: Row actions (view, edit, delete) are always visible on mobile — not hidden behind hover/opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 88-99: Actions are inside an expandable section that requires tapping to reveal. They are not 'always visible' — the user must first expand the card. While this removes the hover dependency, it adds a tap-to-reveal gate.

assertion_results.text: Action buttons are at least 44x44 CSS px on mobile — the p-1 with w-3.5 h-3.5 icons (28px total) is enlarged
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 89-99: Action buttons use flex-1 py-2 — approximately 36px height (8px*2 padding + 20px content). Below the 44px minimum. Expand toggle at line 57 is p-1 with w-4 h-4 icon ≈ 24px.

assertion_results.text: Toolbar icons (filter, download) are enlarged to at least 44x44 CSS px tap targets — the p-1.5 with w-4 h-4 (30px) originals are not adequate
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 130-144: Export and Filter buttons use p-2 with w-4 h-4 icons ≈ 32px. Below the 44px minimum.

assertion_results.text: The mobile layout does not cause horizontal document-level scroll
assertion_results.evidence: Mobile-only card layout with max-w-lg mx-auto. No table or wide elements. All inputs use w-full.
